questionHtml: Using a tariff diagram, explain the effect of the “preliminary tariffs” on Canadian consumers of drywall (paragraph [3]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can receive a maximum of [3].

The use of P and Q on the axes is sufficient for a demand and supply diagram. The world supply curve must be labelled Sw, or Sworld. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using a tariff diagram, explain the effect of the “preliminary tariffs” on Canadian consumers of drywall (paragraph [3]).
